channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Demands McConnell Aide Be Fired
item.description: President Donald Trump called for a staffer to be "immediately fired" for making Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., "look foolish and completely out of it."

item.title: House Republican misses another week of votes as health absence strains thin majority
item.description: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. will remain absent from Congress for over two months due to an unspecified health issue, with his office saying he will return to a vote soon.

item.title: FDA Doctors Linked Child Deaths to COVID Vaccines - Biden Admin Stayed Silent
Platner called PTSD excuse 'bulls---' in 2020 post, now cites his own struggle to explain online controversies
item.description: Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner once said PTSD is no excuse for "garbage behavior," yet now cites the condition to explain his offensive social media posts.
